ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.host'), "port" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.path'), "method" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::darwinbox-attrition.clientSecret'), "body" : { "api_key" : Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.api_key'), "datasetKey": Mule::p('darwinbox-attrition.datasetKey') } }
"attrition"

logger.doc:name: After Darwinbox Response Log
logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-attrition-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "AFTER SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (payload.employee_data? and !isEmpty(payload.employee_data)) payload.employee_data map (employee, index) -> { (employee - "employee_separation_comments"), "employee_separation_comments": if (employee.employee_separation_comments? and !isEmpty(employee.employee_separation_comments)) employee.employee_separation_comments replace /\n/ with " " else employee.employee_separation_comments } else []

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('databricks.host'), "port" : Mule::p('databricks.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('databricks.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('databricks.path'), "method" : Mule::p('databricks.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('databricks.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::databricks.clientSecret') }

logger.doc:name: Before Databricks Upload Log
logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-attrition-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "BEFORE DATALAKE SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.host'), "port" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.path'), "method" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::darwinbox-masteremployee.clientSecret'), "body" : { "api_key" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.api_key'), "datasetKey" : Mule::p('darwinbox-masteremployee.datasetKey') }
}
"masteremployee"

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.host'), "port" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.path'), "method" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::darwinbox-lopapi.clientSecret'), "body" : { "api_key" : Mule::p('darwinbox-lopapi.api_key')
} }

logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-lopapi-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "AFTER SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (payload.emp_daily_attendance? and !isEmpty(payload.emp_daily_attendance)) payload.emp_daily_attendance else []

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('databricks.host'), "port" : Mule::p('databricks.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('databricks.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('databricks.path'), "method" : Mule::p('databricks.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('databricks.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::databricks.clientSecret') }

logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-lopapi-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "BEFORE DATALAKE SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.host'), "port" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.path'), "method" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::darwinbox-employeehistory.clientSecret'), "body" : { "api_key" : Mule::p('darwinbox-employeehistory.api_key')
} }
"employeeHistory"

logger.doc:name: After Darwinbox Response Log
logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-employeehistory-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "AFTER SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (payload.data? and !isEmpty(payload.data)) payload.data else []

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host" : Mule::p('databricks.host'), "port" : Mule::p('databricks.port'), "basePath" : Mule::p('databricks.basePath'), "path" : Mule::p('databricks.path'), "method" : Mule::p('databricks.method'), "clientId" : Mule::p('databricks.clientId'), "clientSecret": Mule::p('secure::databricks.clientSecret') }

logger.doc:name: Before Databricks Upload Log
logger.message: #[output application/json --- { "flowName": "scheduler-darwinbox-employeehistory-orchestration-flow", "tracePoint": "BEFORE DATALAKE SYS API REQUEST", "contentSize": sizeOf(payload) default 0 }]
